data.title: Ethereum researcher Josh Stark exits Foundation, most notable departure since organization's Q1 2025 shakeup.
data.description: Stark's departure from the Ethereum Foundation stands out as a prominent exit from the organization following a significant reorganization in the first quarter of 2025.

data.title: Aviation Capital Group Appoints Rob Downes to New Role as Chief OEM Officer
data.description: Earlier today in Newport Beach, California, Aviation Capital Group LLC (ACG) introduced Rob Downes as the inaugural Chief OEM Officer. ACG, a renowned full-service aircraft asset manager, made this announcement as part of its ongoing commitment to enhancing its executive team. Downes will be responsible for strengthening ACG's ties with Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs) in their strategic operations. This strategic move underscores ACG's stature as a premier global lessor in the aviation industry.

data.title: Euronet Announces First Quarter Earnings Release Date and Conference Call Details
data.description: Leawood, Kansas-based Euronet (NASDAQ: EEFT), a prominent player in payments processing and cross-border transactions worldwide, disclosed plans to unveil its Q1 2026 financial outcomes before the market opens on Wednesday, April 29, 2026. Alongside this announcement, the company slated a conference call at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to delve into the performance details further.

data.title: Rowan University announces $10M gift to create School of Financial Planning
data.description: Glassboro, New Jersey - On April 16, 2026, Rowan University revealed a significant development with a $10 million pledge from Edelman Financial Engines. This contribution aims to create the School of Financial Planning in response to the growing scarcity of skilled financial planners across the country.

data.title: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES TO DISCUSS FIRST QUARTER 2026 FINANCIAL RESULTS ON APRIL 23, 2026
data.description: Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE: LUV) has scheduled a live webcast to present its first quarter 2026 financial results. The event will take place on Thursday, April 23, 2026, at 10:00 AM Eastern Time. Bob Jordan, the President and Chief Executive Officer, will be leading the presentation. Stay tuned for important updates regarding the company's performance.

data.title: Statement on the Passing of Rene Bharti, Founder and Director of Consolidated Lithium Metals
data.description: On April 16, 2026, in Toronto, Consolidated Lithium Metals sadly announced the death of their esteemed colleague, founder, and friend, Rene Bharti.

data.title: Reflecting on childhood memories with Heelys, the wheel-equipped sneakers that were popular in the 2000s, I rediscovered their momentum.
data.description: Heelys, the popular wheeled sneakers from the 2000s, played a significant role in fostering my initial social connections. Inspired by nostalgia, I have chosen to rekindle that sense of happiness by utilizing them once more.

data.title: 5WPR Releases Inaugural Gaming Trust Index, Exposing a $3.9 billion Spend Misallocation Across the U.S. Gambling and Gaming Market
data.description: A recent study conducted annually revealed that the industry allocates 16 times more money towards TV advertising compared to PR and earned media. Surprisingly, responsible gambling programs receive less than one-eighth of the budget that goes into celebrity endorsement deals. This information surfaced in New York on April 16, 2026, by 5WPR, a prominent independent public relations company.

data.title: Coventry Ranks #1 in 2025 Life Settlement League Table Report
data.description: In terms of policy count, face value, and total amount paid to policyholders, Coventry is at the forefront of the secondary market, solidifying its position as the industry's most engaged and reliable purchaser. The company, headquartered in Fort Washington, Pennsylvania, holds a leading position with the highest numbers across these categories. Without a doubt, Coventry has established itself as a prominent figure in the industry for consistently purchasing policies.

data.title: Coelacanth Energy secures C$60M in bought deal financing.
data.description: In recent developments, the country's GDP grew by 5% in the last quarter, indicating positive economic progress. The unemployment rate has dropped to 4.2%, with 300,000 new jobs created. Additionally, the stock market has reached a record high, with the main index increasing by 8% in the past month. Experts suggest that these trends are signs of a strengthening economy and a favorable business environment. However, there are concerns regarding inflation, which has risen to 3.5% due to increased global commodity prices. Economists are closely monitoring these factors to ensure sustainable growth and stability in the market.

data.title: Lexar to Showcase High-Capacity Storage Solutions Built for Professionals and Creators at NAB
data.description: Lexar, a well-known brand in flash memory solutions, is set to showcase its latest products at NAB in San Jose, California on April 16, 2026. Among the products featured are the ARMOR 700 Portable SSD boasting a storage capacity of 8TB, and the SILVER PLUS microSD Card with a capacity of 2TB. These innovations cater to the needs of creators by offering ample space to capture, store, and transfer large 4K and 8K content.

data.title: LifeVantage Appointing Terrence Moorehead as Chief Executive Officer
data.description: Salt Lake City, April 16, 2026 - LifeVantage Corporation (Nasdaq: LFVN) declared the selection of Terrence Moorehead as the new President and Chief Executive Officer and a member of the Board of Directors, starting August 5, 2026. Moorehead is anticipated to join the company after fulfilling his current employment obligations. LifeVantage is a prominent health and wellness entity known for its products that trigger optimal health processes on a cellular level.

data.title: SANMINA CORPORATION INVITES YOU TO JOIN ITS SECOND QUARTER FISCAL 2026 EARNINGS CONFERENCE CALL
data.description: In San Jose, California, on April 16, 2026, Sanmina Corporation (NASDAQ: SANM) disclosed plans to hold its Q2 fiscal 2026 earnings conference call on April 27, 2026, at 5:00 PM ET. The event will include a live webcast presentation and supplementary materials.

data.title: Sun Auto Network Expands Midwest Footprint with New Kentucky Store and Two Illinois Acquisitions
data.description: Plaza Tire Service has recently launched its 89th store, further expanding its reach in Kentucky. Checkpoint Tire & Service has also joined the Sun Auto Network, enhancing its footprint in Illinois by introducing an Express Lube service. These developments come as part of Sun Auto Network's ongoing investment strategy in expanding its operations. The latest store opening marks a significant milestone for Plaza Tire Service, bringing the total number of locations to 89. The addition of Checkpoint Tire & Service to the Sun Auto Network will bolster its presence in Illinois, catering to the growing demand for automotive services in the region.
